figures.caption: Figure 2: Overview of our proposed framework. In watermark injection, LLM repeatedly samples a sentence until its parsed AMR matches a secret template drawn from the bank; in watermark detection, we parse each sentence of a candidate paragraph, count AMR matches, and apply a z-test—because the watermark lives in the AMR graph, any paraphrase that preserves meaning leaves the signal intact.

Table 5: Illustrative paragraphs for each watermarking method. Using the LLM-judged coherence, fluency, and diversity metrics (§4.4), we select one example that scores toward the higher end (High-quality) and another toward the lower end (Low-quality) to visualise the range of output quality.
